entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: All may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of PrettyGoodAI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, this is Marcus Thompson. I'm calling to request a refill for my Lisinopril 10 milligrams, taken once daily, for high blood pressure. I use the Lakeside Pharmacy on 5th Street in town. How long will the refill take, and do I need an appointment or can it be called in directly?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please share your date of birth. Please share your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, my date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check that for you. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'm looking to get a refill on my Lisinopril 10 milligrams once daily. The pharmacy is Lakeside Pharmacy on 5th Street. Will I need to come in for an appointment, or can it be called in directly, and how long will it take?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I need one quick detail first: How many days of lisinopril do you have left?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I’ve got about three days left. That’s why I’m checking on how quickly we can get this refill in.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I have three days left. What callback number should staff use if they need to reach you?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check the refill details. Sure, what pharmacy would you like us to use for the medication request? Please share the pharmacy name and if you have it, the address, phone number, or fax number.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: The pharmacy is Lakeside Pharmacy on 5th Street. I don't have the phone or fax number handy, but it’s the main one on 5th Street in town.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I need one more detail to make sure we have the right branch. What city and state is Lakeside Pharmacy in, or the zip code?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: It’s in Riverview, Ohio, zip code 44123.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your refill request has been submitted to the care team for review. It has not been sent to the pharmacy yet. If you are running out sooner or if your symptoms are changing, you can call back. Do you need any other medications refilled?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: No, that’s the only medication I need refilled right now. Could you let me know how long it typically takes to process?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your refill request for lisinopril has been sent to the care team for review. They will handle it and it is not called in directly to the pharmacy from here. You do not need an appointment for the refill request itself. If you want, I can also help with anything else today.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Thanks for the update. That’s all I needed for now. I appreciate your help.
